# breathcult

> Free guided breathing pacer with 6 science-backed techniques. No app download required. Works on any device.

breathcult is a web-based breathing pacer that guides users through precisely timed breathing exercises. All timings are validated against published research.

## Techniques

### Box Breathing
- Pattern: Inhale 4s, Hold 4s, Exhale 4s, Hold 4s
- Duration: ~5 minutes (19 rounds)
- Used by: Navy SEALs, first responders
- Best for: Focus, calm, stress management

### 4-7-8 Breathing
- Pattern: Inhale 4s, Hold 7s, Exhale 8s
- Duration: ~5 minutes (4 rounds)
- Developed by: Dr. Andrew Weil
- Best for: Sleep, anxiety, wind-down

### Physiological Sigh
- Pattern: Inhale 2s, Sniff 1s, Exhale 6s
- Duration: ~27 seconds (3 rounds)
- Research: Stanford University (Huberman Lab)
- Best for: Instant stress relief, real-time calm

### Resonant Breathing
- Pattern: Inhale 5.5s, Exhale 5.5s
- Duration: ~5 minutes (27 rounds)
- Rate: 5.5 breaths per minute
- Best for: Heart rate variability, coherence, balance

### Wim Hof Method
- Pattern: 30 Power Breaths (2.5s each), Hold Empty 60s, Recovery Breath 15s
- Duration: ~3 rounds
- Safety: Never practice near water, while driving, or standing. Not for epilepsy, pregnancy, or cardiovascular conditions.
- Best for: Energy, cold tolerance, immune activation

### Cyclic Sighing
- Pattern: Inhale 3s, Sniff 1s, Exhale 8s
- Duration: 5 minutes (25 rounds)
- Research: Stanford study found it more effective than meditation for mood improvement
- Best for: Daily mood boost, anxiety reduction

## About

- Creator: Dylon Hernandez (@dylonhernandez)
- Brand: breathcult
- Price: Free
- Platform: Web (no app download needed)
- URL: https://breathcult.com
